name: eaa-stream-checker
description: EAA Stream Checker — accessibility compliance tool for streaming services

scripts.postinstall: if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then ALPINE_VER=$(cat /etc/alpine-release | cut -d. -f1,2); echo "[postinstall] Alpine ${ALPINE_VER}"; apk add --no-cache --repository=https://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v${ALPINE_VER}/community chromium nss freetype harfbuzz ca-certificates ttf-freefont 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache chromium nss freetype harfbuzz ca-certificates ttf-freefont 2>&1; if command -v chromium-browser >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[postinstall] OK: $(chromium-browser --version 2>&1)"; else echo "[postinstall] WARNING: chromium-browser not found after install"; fi; elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx playwright-core install --with-deps chromium 2>&1; else npx playwright-core install chromium 2>&1; fi || true
scripts.build: if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ] && ! command -v chromium-browser >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[build] Installing Chromium (postinstall missed)...'; ALPINE_VER=$(cat /etc/alpine-release | cut -d. -f1,2); apk add --no-cache --repository=https://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v${ALPINE_VER}/community chromium nss freetype harfbuzz ca-certificates ttf-freefont 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache chromium nss freetype harfbuzz ca-certificates ttf-freefont 2>&1 || true; fi; tsc
